description: Comprehensive systems approach to civil infrastructure and asset management with emphasis on transportation facilities. Social, political, economic factors that influence transportation planning, design, construction, maintenance and operation. Needs assessment, information management, performance measurement, life cycle cost and benefits analysis, prioritization and optimization, budgeting and finance.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: CIV ENGR 494, or graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: CIV ENGR 494, or graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
